popularStory.headline: "Castelo de Lanhoso", também referido como "Castelo de Póvoa de Lanhoso"D. Rui Gonçalves Pereira, 1º Senhor da Honra de Pereira
popularStory.description:
O "Castelo de Lanhoso", também referido como "Castelo de Póvoa de Lanhoso", localiza-se na freguesia de Póvoa de Lanhoso, concelho de mesmo nome, distrito de Braga, em Portugal.

Embora bastante desca …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ruy Gonçalves Pereira - I Senhor de Pereira於大約1170年出生在西班牙加利西亞A 可盧納費洛爾特拉桑可斯時，他的父親Gonçalo Rodrigues, Senhor da Palmeira23歲，母親Froille Affonso de Celanova26歲。他和D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1235年在葡萄牙布拉加彭利拿享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ruy Gonçalves Pereira - I Senhor de Pereira于大约1170年出生在西班牙加利西亞A 可盧納費洛爾特拉桑可斯时，他的父亲Gonçalo Rodrigues, Senhor da Palmeira23岁，母亲Froille Affonso de Celanova26岁。他和D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于大约1235年在葡萄牙布拉加彭利拿享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Senhor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English seignour ‘lord’ (Old French seignor), either for someone who was a lord (for example, of a manor), or perhaps a nickname for a peasant who emulated his lord.
distinguishing nickname for the elder of two bearers of the same personal name (for example, a father and son or two brothers), from Middle English, Latin senior ‘elder’.
English:

variants.name: Saner
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): variant of   Senior  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Siner
meanings: English: variant of   Senior  .

variants.name: Sinor
meanings: English: possibly a shortened form of   Senior  .

variants.name: Sinyard
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of Senior , with excrescent -d.
Altered form of French   Sinard  .

variants.name: Sanor
meanings: English (Yorkshire): perhaps a variant of   Senior  .

variants.name: Seanor
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Senior  .

variants.name: Seeney
meanings: English: variant of   Senior  .
Irish: variant of   Sweeney  .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pereira
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Mario, Fernando, Jorge, Francisco, Pedro, Juan, Julio, Armando.  Portuguese Joao, Paulo, Joaquim, Henrique, Ilidio, Agostinho, Duarte, Amadeu, Adao, Ademir, Ligia, Aderito.

Portuguese and Galician: topographic name from Portuguese pereira ‘pear tree’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word in Portugal and Galicia (Spain). This surname is also found in western India, having been taken there by Portuguese colonists.

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Iberian surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Pereyra
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Jorge, Ruben, Ana, Fernando, Juan, Julio, Pablo, Pedro.
Portuguese and Galician: variant of   Pereira  .

variants.name: Perreira
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Alberto, Alfredo, Ana Lucia, Carmelita, Domingos, Gustavo, Lauriano, Luis, Orlando.  Portuguese Agostinho.
Portuguese (mainly Brazil): variant of   Pereira  .

variants.name: Parreira
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Francisco, Avelina, Cesar, Helio, Herminia, Luis, Luisa, Pedro, Valentina.
Portuguese: variant of   Pereira  .

variants.name: Pereida
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Julio, Manuel, Ernesto, Esteban, Eugenio, Felipe, Fermin, Hilario, Jose Luis, Leticia, Marina.
Hispanic (mainly Mexico): altered form of Portugese and Galician   Pereira  , or of Asturian-Leonese and Galician   Pereda  .

variants.name: Perera
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Emilio, Jorge, Orlando, Roberto, Armando, Carlos, Juan, Ana, Francisco, Hermino, Manuel.  Indian Nihal, Gamini, Rohan, Daya, Kusum, Mahesh, Manoj, Sonali, Swarna, Ananda, Anura, Ashok.
Catalan: topographic name from perera ‘pear tree’.
Galician and Portuguese: variant of   Pereira  . This surname is also found in western India, where it was taken by Portuguese colonists.

nameMeanings.name: Ruy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Rodrigo .  This form was common in the Middle Ages, being borne, for example, by  El Cid ,  Ruy Diaz de Vivar  (  ?1043–99 ).

nameMeanings.name: Gonçalves
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Fernando, Luis, Domingos, Jorge, Ana, Jaime, Francisco, Alfredo, Armando.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Sebastiao, Albano, Catarina, Duarte, Henrique, Marcio, Martinho, Serafim, Terezinha.
Portuguese (Gonçálves): patronymic from the personal name Gonçalo (see Gonzalo ). Compare Gonsalves .

variants.name: Gonzalo
meanings: Visigothic: from a personal name formed with gund ‘battle, strife’.

variants.name: Gonsalves
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Fernando, Americo, Joaquin, Jorge, Luis, Miguel, Bernardo, Jose Carlos, Juvenal, Pedro.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim.
Portuguese: variant of Gonçalves (see Goncalves ). This surname is also found in western India, where it was taken by Portuguese colonists.

Portuguese and Galician: topographic name from Portuguese pereira ‘pear tree’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word in Portugal and Galicia (Spain). This surname is also found in western India, having been taken there by Portuguese colonists.

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Iberian surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Ruy Gonçalves Pereira - I Senhor de Pereira was born about 1170, in Trasancos, Ferrol, A Coruña, Galicia, Spain, his father, Gonçalo Rodrigues, Senhor da Palmeira, was 23 and his mother, Froille Affonso de Celanova, was 26. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro. He died about 1235, in Pereira, Braga, Portugal, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ruy Gonçalves Pereira - I Senhor de Pereira est né environ 1170, à Trasancos, Ferrol, A Coruña, Galicia, Espagne, son père, Gonçalo Rodrigues, Senhor da Palmeira, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Froille Affonso de Celanova, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro. Il est décédé environ 1235, à Pereira, Braga, Portugal, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.Trasancos, Ferrol, A Coruña, Galicia, Sp: Trasancos, Ferrol, A Coruña, Galicia, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Ruy Gonçalves Pereira - I Senhor de Pereira um 1170 in Trasancos, Ferrol, A Coruña, Galicia, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gonçalo Rodrigues, Senhor da Palmeira 23 und seine Mutter Froille Affonso de Celanova 26. Er hatte mit D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1235 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Pereira, Braga, Portugal.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ruy Gonçalves Pereira - I Senhor de Pereira è nato il circa 1170 nel Trasancos, Ferrol, A Coruña, Galicia, Spagna, il suo padre, Gonçalo Rodrigues, Senhor da Palmeira, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Froille Affonso de Celanova, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro. Morì circa 1235, nel Pereira, Braga, Portogallo, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ruy Gonçalves Pereira - I Senhor de Pereiraが約1170年にスペインガリシアア コルnアフエロルトラサンコスで生まれた時，父Gonçalo Rodrigues, Senhor da Palmeiraは23歳，母Froille Affonso de Celanovaは26歳であった。彼はD. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiroとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1235年にポルトガルブラガペレイラで67歳で死去した。

ko.Trasancos, Ferrol, A Coruña, Galicia, Sp: 스페인 갈리샤 아 코루n아 페럴 트라산코스
ko.lifeSummary: Ruy Gonçalves Pereira - I Senhor de Pereira(이)가 대략 1170년 스페인 갈리샤 아 코루n아 페럴 트라산코스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gonçalo Rodrigues, Senhor da Palmeira(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Froille Affonso de Celanova(은)는 26세였다. 그는 D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1235년 포르투갈 브라가 페레이라에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ruy Gonçalves Pereira - I Senhor de Pereira nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Trasancos, Ferrol, A Coruña, Galicia, Espanha, seu pai, Gonçalo Rodrigues, Senhor da Palmeira, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Froille Affonso de Celanova, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1235, em Pereira, Braga, Portugal, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ruy Gonçalves Pereira - I Senhor de Pereira родился около 1170 г. в местности трасанкос, фиррол, а коруnа, галися, Испания, его отцу по имени Gonçalo Rodrigues, Senhor da Palmeira было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Froille Affonso de Celanova, 26. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro. Он умер около 1235 г. в местности пирира, брага, Португалия в возрасте 67 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro. Murió aproximadamente 1235, en Pereira, Braga, Portugal, a la edad de 67 años.
